CustomField.label: Discipline
CustomField.description: Specialist discipline copied from NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt.Discipline__c at team assembly time. Denormalized for reporting and filtering without traversing the CMT. Must match ServiceResource.nepa_discipline__c exactly. Set by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator when nepa_assembly_source__c = GIS_Auto_Assembly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Specialist discipline for this team role (e.g., Hydrologist, Geologist). Set automatically by GIS team assembly.
